dataQuery.sqlStatement:
select a.vendor_id, E.ATTRIBUTE9, a.vendor_site_id, a.INVOICE_ID, b.LINE_NUMBER, d.segment1 unit, a.invoice_num, a.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1, a.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2, e.vendor_name, e.segment1 vendor_num, f.vendor_site_code, (Select TAG from apps.fnd_lookup_values flv where flv.LOOKUP_TYPE ='XXAU_GST UNIT_STATE_WITH_GSTNO' and flv.LOOKUP_CODE=d.segment1 and rownum<=1) State_GSTIN, (Select replace(replace(replace(DESCRIPTION,'AUPL_'),'_Org'),'_ORG') from apps.fnd_lookup_values flv where flv.LOOKUP_TYPE ='XXAU_GST UNIT_STATE_WITH_GSTNO' and flv.LOOKUP_CODE=d.segment1 and rownum<=1) Place_of_Supply_State, --------change by sumit (ChETAN REQ)--------------------- CASE WHEN :p_org_id = 386 THEN (SELECT FILLING_PERIOD_OF_GSTR_1_5 FROM XXAU_GST_INPUT_MONTH@ebstohr WHERE INVOICE_ID = a.invoice_id and org_id=:p_org_id and rownum<=1) WHEN :p_org_id = 288 THEN (SELECT FILLING_PERIOD_OF_GSTR_1_5 FROM XXAU_GST_INPUT_MONTH@ebstohr WHERE INVOICE_ID = a.invoice_id and org_id=:p_org_id and rownum<=1) ELSE NULL END GST_CLAIM_MONTH, CASE WHEN a.vendor_id = 41149 AND invoice_date <= '31-OCT-2019' THEN '09AAACM6054H1ZG' WHEN a.vendor_id = 41149 AND invoice_date >= '01-NOV-2019' THEN '09AAACM6054H2ZF' WHEN a.attribute_category = 'GST Details' AND a.attribute1 IS NOT NULL THEN a.attribute1 ELSE ((xxau_gst_utility_pkg.tp_registration_number@ebstohr (a.vendor_id, a.vendor_site_id, 'GST', 'S' ) ) ) END gst_no, ------------------------------------------------ gsti.GSTR_2A_2B_STATUS GSTR_2A_STATUS, gsti.ITC_AVAILABLITY its_avail, gsti.REASON_OF_ITC_UNAVAILABLITY reason , to_char(gsti.DATE_OF_GSTR_FILLED ,'DD-MON-YYYY') gstr_date, gsti.FILLING_PERIOD_OF_GSTR_1_5 gstr_period, ------------------------------------------------- /* (SELECT ITC_AVAILABLITY FROM XXAU_GST_INPUT_MONTH@ebstohr WHERE INVOICE_ID = a.invoice_id and org_id=:p_org_id) its_avail, (SELECT REASON_OF_ITC_UNAVAILABLITY FROM XXAU_GST_INPUT_MONTH@ebstohr WHERE INVOICE_ID = a.invoice_id and org_id=:p_org_id ) reason, (SELECT to_char(DATE_OF_GSTR_FILLED,'DD-MON-YYYY') FROM XXAU_GST_INPUT_MONTH@ebstohr WHERE INVOICE_ID = a.invoice_id and org_id=:p_org_id) gstr_date, (SELECT FILLING_PERIOD_OF_GSTR_1_5 FROM XXAU_GST_INPUT_MONTH@ebstohr WHERE INVOICE_ID = a.invoice_id and org_id=:p_org_id) gstr_period, --------------------------------- (select b1.REGISTRATION_NUMBER from jai_party_regs a1, jai_party_reg_lines b1 where 1=1 and a1.party_reg_id = b1.party_reg_id and a1.party_id = a.vendor_id and a1.party_site_id = a.vendor_site_id and a1.PARTY_TYPE_CODE = 'THIRD_PARTY_SITE' and a1.SUPPLIER_FLAG = 'Y' and a1.site_flag = 'Y' and b1.REGISTRATION_TYPE_CODE = 'GSTIN' and TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN NVL(b1.EFFECTIVE_FROM,SYSDATE) and NVL(b1.EFFECTIVE_TO,SYSDATE+1) --V2.0 and rownum<=1) GST_No,*/ (select b1.REGISTRATION_NUMBER from jai_party_regs a1, jai_party_reg_lines b1 where 1=1 and a1.party_reg_id = b1.party_reg_id and a1.party_id = a.vendor_id and a1.party_site_id = a.vendor_site_id and a1.PARTY_TYPE_CODE = 'THIRD_PARTY_SITE' and a1.SUPPLIER_FLAG = 'Y' and a1.site_flag = 'Y' and b1.REGISTRATION_TYPE_CODE = 'PAN' and TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN NVL(b1.EFFECTIVE_FROM,SYSDATE) and NVL(b1.EFFECTIVE_TO,SYSDATE+1) --V2.0 and rownum<=1 ) PAN_No, --- e.vendor_type_lookup_code, e.attribute1 ven_sub_cat, a.invoice_type_lookup_code, a.invoice_amount, to_char(a.invoice_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') invoice_date, -- to_char(a.gl_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') gl_date, (SELECT max(to_char(ACCOUNTING_DATE,'DD-MON-YYYY')) FROM AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL WHERE 1=1 --AND INVOICE_ID='3857269' AND INVOICE_ID = a.invoice_id AND LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE in ('ACCRUAL','ITEM') AND INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER = c.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER -- AND ROWNUM=1 ) gl_date, (select a1.segment1 from po_headers_all a1 where a1.po_header_id = b.po_header_id) po_num, (select a1.RECEIPT_NUM from RCV_SHIPMENT_headers a1, RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES b1 where 1=1 and a1.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID = b1.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID and b1.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = b.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID and rownum<=1) Receipt_Number, d.concatenated_segments Account_code, (select a.DESCRIPTION from fnd_flex_values_vl a, fnd_flex_value_sets b where 1=1 and a.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = b.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID and a.flex_value = d.segment5 and b.FLEX_VALUE_SET_NAME IN ('AUPL_Natural_Account','IPPL_Natural Account')) Account_Desc, (g.line_amt + nvl((select sum(a1.ROUNDED_TAX_AMT_TAX_CURR) from jai_tax_lines a1 where a1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and a1.tax_rate_code not like '%GST%' and a1.tax_line_num in (select x1.PRECEDENCE_1 from jai_tax_lines x1 where x1.tax_rate_code like '%GST%' and x1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id union all select x1.PRECEDENCE_2 from jai_tax_lines x1 where x1.tax_rate_code like '%GST%' and x1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id union all select x1.PRECEDENCE_3 from jai_tax_lines x1 where x1.tax_rate_code like '%GST%' and x1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id union all select x1.PRECEDENCE_4 from jai_tax_lines x1 where x1.tax_rate_code like '%GST%' and x1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id union all select x1.PRECEDENCE_5 from jai_tax_lines x1 where x1.tax_rate_code like '%GST%' and x1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id)),0)) basic_amt, nvl((select a1.reporting_code from jai_reporting_codes a1 where a1.reporting_code_id = g.hsn_code_id and a1.REPORTING_TYPE_ID = 10000), (select a1.reporting_code from jai_reporting_codes a1 where a1.reporting_code_id = g.sac_code_id and a1.REPORTING_TYPE_ID = 10002)) hsn_code, b.ATTRIBUTE10 Tax_Nature, nvl((select sum(a1.ROUNDED_TAX_AMT_TAX_CURR) from jai_tax_lines a1 where a1.tax_rate_code like '%CGST%' and a1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id),0) - nvl(nvl((select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) from JAI_RGM_RECOVERY_LINES a1 ,jai_tax_lines b1 where a1.tax_line_id=b1.tax_line_id and b1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and b1.tax_rate_code like '%CGST%' and a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date and a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED'), (select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) FROM jai_tax_lines jtl ,jai_rgm_recovery_lines a1 ,rcv_shipment_lines rsl WHERE jtl.TRX_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID AND jtl.TRX_LINE_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID AND jtl.APPLICATION_ID = 707 AND jtl.ENTITY_CODE = 'RCV_TRANSACTION' AND a1.tax_line_id = jtl.tax_line_id AND jtl.tax_rate_code like '%CGST%' AND a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date AND a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED' AND rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = b.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID)),0)+ nvl(nvl((select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) from JAI_RGM_RECOVERY_LINES a1 ,jai_tax_lines b1 where a1.tax_line_id=b1.tax_line_id and b1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and b1.tax_rate_code like '%CGST%' and a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date and a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED'), (select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) FROM jai_tax_lines jtl ,jai_rgm_recovery_lines a1 ,rcv_shipment_lines rsl WHERE jtl.TRX_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID AND jtl.TRX_LINE_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID AND jtl.APPLICATION_ID = 707 AND jtl.ENTITY_CODE = 'RCV_TRANSACTION' AND a1.tax_line_id = jtl.tax_line_id AND jtl.tax_rate_code like '%CGST%' AND a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date AND a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED' AND rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = b.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID)),0) cgst_input_amt, -----------add by sumit ---------------------------------------------------------- nvl((select sum(a1.ROUNDED_TAX_AMT_TAX_CURR) from jai_tax_lines a1 where a1.tax_rate_code like '%SGST%' and a1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id),0) + nvl((select sum(a1.ROUNDED_TAX_AMT_TAX_CURR) from jai_tax_lines a1 where a1.tax_rate_code like '%UTGST%' and a1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id),0) + nvl(nvl((select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) from JAI_RGM_RECOVERY_LINES a1 ,jai_tax_lines b1 where a1.tax_line_id=b1.tax_line_id and b1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and b1.tax_rate_code like '%SGST%' and a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date and a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED'),(select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) FROM jai_tax_lines jtl ,jai_rgm_recovery_lines a1 ,rcv_shipment_lines rsl WHERE jtl.TRX_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID AND jtl.TRX_LINE_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID AND jtl.APPLICATION_ID = 707 AND jtl.ENTITY_CODE = 'RCV_TRANSACTION' AND a1.tax_line_id = jtl.tax_line_id AND jtl.tax_rate_code like '%SGST%' AND a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date AND a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED' AND rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = b.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID)),0)- nvl(nvl((select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) from JAI_RGM_RECOVERY_LINES a1 ,jai_tax_lines b1 where a1.tax_line_id=b1.tax_line_id and b1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and b1.tax_rate_code like '%SGST%' and a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date and a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED'),(select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) FROM jai_tax_lines jtl ,jai_rgm_recovery_lines a1 ,rcv_shipment_lines rsl WHERE jtl.TRX_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID AND jtl.TRX_LINE_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID AND jtl.APPLICATION_ID = 707 AND jtl.ENTITY_CODE = 'RCV_TRANSACTION' AND a1.tax_line_id = jtl.tax_line_id AND jtl.tax_rate_code like '%SGST%' AND a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date AND a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED' AND rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = b.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID)),0) + nvl(nvl((select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) from JAI_RGM_RECOVERY_LINES a1 ,jai_tax_lines b1 where a1.tax_line_id=b1.tax_line_id and b1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and b1.tax_rate_code like '%UTGST%' and a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date and a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED'),(select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) FROM jai_tax_lines jtl ,jai_rgm_recovery_lines a1 ,rcv_shipment_lines rsl WHERE jtl.TRX_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID AND jtl.TRX_LINE_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID AND jtl.APPLICATION_ID = 707 AND jtl.ENTITY_CODE = 'RCV_TRANSACTION' AND a1.tax_line_id = jtl.tax_line_id AND jtl.tax_rate_code like '%UTGST%' AND a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date AND a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED' AND rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = b.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID)),0) - nvl(nvl((select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) from JAI_RGM_RECOVERY_LINES a1 ,jai_tax_lines b1 where a1.tax_line_id=b1.tax_line_id and b1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and b1.tax_rate_code like '%UTGST%' and a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date and a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED'),(select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) FROM jai_tax_lines jtl ,jai_rgm_recovery_lines a1 ,rcv_shipment_lines rsl WHERE jtl.TRX_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID AND jtl.TRX_LINE_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID AND jtl.APPLICATION_ID = 707 AND jtl.ENTITY_CODE = 'RCV_TRANSACTION' AND a1.tax_line_id = jtl.tax_line_id AND jtl.tax_rate_code like '%UTGST%' AND a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date AND a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED' AND rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = b.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID)),0) sgst_utgst_input_amt, ---------add by sumit ------------------------------------------------------------- nvl((select sum(a1.ROUNDED_TAX_AMT_TAX_CURR) from jai_tax_lines a1 where a1.tax_rate_code like '%IGST%' and a1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id),0) + nvl(nvl((select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) from JAI_RGM_RECOVERY_LINES a1 ,jai_tax_lines b1 where a1.tax_line_id=b1.tax_line_id and b1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and b1.tax_rate_code like '%IGST%' and a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date and a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED'),(select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) FROM jai_tax_lines jtl ,jai_rgm_recovery_lines a1 ,rcv_shipment_lines rsl WHERE jtl.TRX_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID AND jtl.TRX_LINE_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID AND jtl.APPLICATION_ID = 707 AND jtl.ENTITY_CODE = 'RCV_TRANSACTION' AND a1.tax_line_id = jtl.tax_line_id AND jtl.tax_rate_code like '%IGST%' AND a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date AND a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED' AND rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = b.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID)),0)- nvl(nvl((select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) from JAI_RGM_RECOVERY_LINES a1 ,jai_tax_lines b1 where a1.tax_line_id=b1.tax_line_id and b1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and b1.tax_rate_code like '%IGST%' and a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date and a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED'),(select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) FROM jai_tax_lines jtl ,jai_rgm_recovery_lines a1 ,rcv_shipment_lines rsl WHERE jtl.TRX_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID AND jtl.TRX_LINE_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID AND jtl.APPLICATION_ID = 707 AND jtl.ENTITY_CODE = 'RCV_TRANSACTION' AND a1.tax_line_id = jtl.tax_line_id AND jtl.tax_rate_code like '%IGST%' AND a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date AND a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED' AND rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = b.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID)),0) igst_input_amt, (SELECT DISTINCT x.status FROM (SELECT DISTINCT status FROM jai_rgm_recovery_lines WHERE document_id = a.invoice_id ---and a.invoice_id not in 3703130 AND ROWNUM <=1 UNION ALL SELECT status FROM jai_rgm_recovery_lines WHERE document_number = (SELECT a1.receipt_num FROM rcv_shipment_headers a1, rcv_shipment_lines b1 WHERE 1 = 1 AND a1.shipment_header_id = b1.shipment_header_id AND b1.shipment_line_id = b.rcv_shipment_line_id AND ROWNUM <=1) AND ROWNUM <=1) x where ROWNUM <=1) recovered_flag, -----add by sumit ------------------- NVL((SELECT SUM (a1.rounded_tax_amt_tax_curr) FROM jai_tax_lines a1 WHERE a1.tax_rate_code LIKE '%CESS_NON%' AND a1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id),0) cess_amt, -----------------------------
/*nvl((select sum(a1.ROUNDED_TAX_AMT_TAX_CURR) from jai_tax_lines a1 where a1.tax_rate_code not like '%GST%' and a1.PRECEDENCE_1 is not null and a1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id),0)*/ /* nvl((select sum(a1.ROUNDED_TAX_AMT_TAX_CURR) from jai_tax_lines a1 where a1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and a1.tax_rate_code not like '%GST%' and a1.tax_line_num in (select x1.PRECEDENCE_1 from jai_tax_lines x1 where x1.tax_rate_code like '%GST%' and x1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id union all select x1.PRECEDENCE_2 from jai_tax_lines x1 where x1.tax_rate_code like '%GST%' and x1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id union all select x1.PRECEDENCE_3 from jai_tax_lines x1 where x1.tax_rate_code like '%GST%' and x1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id union all select x1.PRECEDENCE_4 from jai_tax_lines x1 where x1.tax_rate_code like '%GST%' and x1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id union all select x1.PRECEDENCE_5 from jai_tax_lines x1 where x1.tax_rate_code like '%GST%' and x1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id)),0) others_amt, */ (select sum(a1.TAX_RATE_PERCENTAGE) from jai_tax_lines a1 where a1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and a1.tax_rate_code like '%GST%') tax_rate, (select ORIGINAL_TAX_INVOICE_NUM from JAI_TAX_DET_FACTORS where DET_FACTOR_ID =G.DET_FACTOR_ID and rownum=1) ORG_TAX_INV, (select TO_CHAR(ORIGINAL_TAX_INVOICE_DATE ,'DD-MON-YYYY') from JAI_TAX_DET_FACTORS where DET_FACTOR_ID =G.DET_FACTOR_ID and rownum=1) ORG_TAX_INV_DT, (SELECT org.organization_code FROM ORG_ORGANIZATION_DEFINITIONS org, jai_tax_det_factors jai WHERE 1 = 1 AND org.organization_id = jai.organization_id AND jai.det_factor_id =g.det_factor_id ) ORG_CODE, -------------------------- nvl(nvl((select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) from JAI_RGM_RECOVERY_LINES a1,jai_tax_lines b1 where a1.tax_line_id=b1.tax_line_id and b1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date and a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED'),(select sum(a1.RECOVERED_AMOUNT) FROM jai_tax_lines jtl ,jai_rgm_recovery_lines a1 ,rcv_shipment_lines rsl WHERE jtl.TRX_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID AND jtl.TRX_LINE_ID = rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID AND jtl.APPLICATION_ID = 707 AND jtl.ENTITY_CODE = 'RCV_TRANSACTION' AND a1.tax_line_id = jtl.tax_line_id AND a1.PROCESSED_DATE <= :p_to_date AND a1.STATUS = 'RECOVERED' AND rsl.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = b.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID)),0) recvd_amt, /*(select substr(a1.tax_type_name,6) from jai_tax_types a1 ,jai_tax_lines b1 where a1.tax_type_id=b1.tax_type_id and b1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and rownum<=1)*/ (select replace(replace(replace(replace(a1.tax_type_name,'CGST_'),'SGST_'),'IGST_'),'UTGST_') from jai_tax_types a1 ,jai_tax_lines b1 where a1.tax_type_id=b1.tax_type_id and b1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and a1.tax_type_name like '%GST%' and rownum<=1) tax_type, ( select RECOVERABLE_FLAG from jai_tax_lines a1 where 1=1 AND ((a1.tax_rate_code like '%IGST%') OR (a1.tax_rate_code like '%SGST%') OR (a1.tax_rate_code like '%UGST%')OR (a1.tax_rate_code like '%CGST%')) and a1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id and rownum<=1) REC_FLAG, /* (SELECT to_char(ACAX.check_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') FROM ap_checks_all ACAX ,ap_invoice_payments_all AIPX WHERE ACAX.check_id = AIPX.check_id AND AIPX.invoice_id = A.invoice_id AND ROWNUM <= 1) payment_date (SELECT to_char(y.PDATE,'DD-MON-YYYY') FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ACAX.check_date PDATE FROM ap_checks_all ACAX ,ap_invoice_payments_all AIPX WHERE ACAX.check_id = AIPX.check_id AND AIPX.invoice_id = A.invoice_id
UNION
select DISTINCT ACCOUNTING_DATE PDATE FROM ap_invoice_lines_all x WHERE x.invoice_id = A.invoice_id AND x.PREPAY_INVOICE_ID is not null )Y WHERE ROWNUM = 1) payment_date,*/ /* (select TO_CHAR(MAX(AIPV.ACCOUNTING_DATE),'DD-MON-YYYY') from ap_invoices_all aia, AP_INVOICE_PAYMENT_HISTORY_V aipv--- AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS_ALL aipv where vendor_id = a.vendor_id and vendor_site_id= F.vendor_site_id and aia.invoice_id=a.invoice_id and aia.invoice_id=aipv.invoice_id AND aipv.ORG_ID=:p_org_id AND NVL(AIPV.VOID,'N')='N' ) payment_date,*/ (select TO_CHAR(max(x.Pay_date),'DD-MON-YYYY') from (SELECT MAX(ACCOUNTING_DATE) Pay_date FROM AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL WHERE INVOICE_ID = a.invoice_id ---and INVOICE_ID = :P_INVOICE_ID AND LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE ='PREPAY' UNION select MAX(AIPV.ACCOUNTING_DATE) Pay_date from ap_invoices_all aia, AP_INVOICE_PAYMENT_HISTORY_V aipv--- AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS_ALL aipv where 1=1 --- AND vendor_id =9186 AND vendor_id = a.vendor_id and vendor_site_id= F.vendor_site_id -- and aia.invoice_id = :P_INVOICE_ID -- and vendor_site_id = 75883 and aia.invoice_id=a.invoice_id and aia.invoice_id=aipv.invoice_id AND aipv.ORG_ID=:p_org_id AND NVL(AIPV.VOID,'N')='N')x) payment_date, (SELECT SEGMENT1 FROM MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B WHERE INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = B.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AND ORGANIZATION_ID in (287,444) and rownum<=1) ITEM_NAME, B.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, ( select DESCRIPTION from FND_LOOKUP_VALUES Where lookup_type = 'XX_ITEM_ACCOUNT_LOOKUP' and lookup_code IN (SELECT SEGMENT1 FROM MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B WHERE INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = B.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AND ORGANIZATION_ID in (287,444))) EXPENSE_ACCOUNT, -----------------Sumit-------------- (SELECT DECODE (apps.ap_invoices_pkg.get_approval_status (i.invoice_id, i.invoice_amount, i.payment_status_flag, i.invoice_type_lookup_code ), 'NEVER APPROVED', 'Never Validated', 'NEEDS REAPPROVAL', 'Needs Revalidation', 'CANCELLED', 'Cancelled', 'Validated' ) invoice_status -- V 4.2 FROM ap_invoices_all i WHERE 1 = 1 AND i.invoice_num = a.invoice_num AND i.invoice_id = a.invoice_iD) INVOICE_STATUS ------------------------------------------ from ap_invoices_all a, ap_invoice_lines_all b, (select ( select * from (select DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID from ap_invoice_distributions_all where invoice_id=x.invoice_id and INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER=x.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER order by DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER desc) where rownum=1) DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,x.invoice_id,x.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER from ap_invoice_distributions_all x where x.org_id = :p_org_id group by x.invoice_id,x.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER) c, Gl_Code_Combinations_kfv d, ap_suppliers e, ap_supplier_sites_all f, jai_tax_det_factors g, aucustom.XXAU_GST_INPUT_MONTH@ebstohr gsti where a.invoice_id = b.invoice_id and b.invoice_id = c.invoice_id AND a.invoice_id = GSTI.invoice_id(+) and b.LINE_NUMBER = c.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER and c.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID = d.CODE_COMBINATION_ID ---and a.vendor_id =30413 and a.vendor_id = e.vendor_id and a.vendor_id = f.vendor_id and a.vendor_site_id = f.vendor_site_id and a.org_id = f.org_id and g.APPLICATION_ID = 200 and g.EVENT_CLASS_CODE = 'STANDARD INVOICES' and g.ENTITY_CODE = 'AP_INVOICES' and g.TRX_ID = a.invoice_id and g.TRX_LINE_ID = b.line_number --and nvl(c.line_type_lookup_code,'X')<> 'MISCELLANEOUS' and nvl(b.line_type_lookup_code,'X')<> 'MISCELLANEOUS' --** and a.CANCELLED_DATE is null and a.org_id = :p_org_id ---and a.invoice_id in (4448271) and a.gl_date between :p_from_date and :p_to_date and d.segment1 = NVL(:P_UNIT,d.segment1) --V2.0 and exists (select 1 from jai_tax_types a1 ,jai_tax_lines b1 where a1.tax_type_id=b1.tax_type_id and a1.tax_type_name like '%GST%' and b1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id --AND DECODE(replace(replace(replace(replace(A1.tax_type_name,'CGST_'),'SGST_'),'IGST_'),'UTGST_'),'REC','R','N')=:p_tax_type /*Chanes done against JIRA AS-266 */--V4.1 AND DECODE(NVL(a1.RECOVERABLE_FLAG,'N'),'Y','R','N') = :p_tax_type --V4.1 and rownum<=1 ) and not exists (select 1 from jai_tax_lines a1, jai_tax_types b1 where a1.tax_type_id = b1.tax_type_id and b1.TAX_TYPE_NAME like '%REV%' and a1.det_factor_id = g.det_factor_id) and exists (SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT jra.REPORTING_CODE FROM JAI_reporting_associations jra ,jai_party_regs jpr WHERE jra.REPORTING_TYPE_NAME = 'Vendor Classification' AND jra.REPORTING_CODE = 'Composite' AND jpr.PARTY_REG_ID = jra.ENTITY_ID AND jpr.PARTY_TYPE_CODE = 'THIRD_PARTY' AND jpr.SUPPLIER_FLAG = 'Y' AND jpr.party_id = a.vendor_id AND :P_VENDOR_CAT = 'Composite' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(JRA.EFFECTIVE_FROM,SYSDATE)) AND TRUNC(NVL(JRA.EFFECTIVE_TO,SYSDATE+1))
UNION ALL SELECT '1' FROM DUAL WHERE 1 = 1 AND :p_vendor_cat = CASE WHEN xxau_gst_utility_pkg.tp_registration_number@ebstohr (a.vendor_id, a.vendor_site_id, 'GST', 'S' ) IS NULL THEN 'Unregistered' WHEN xxau_gst_utility_pkg.tp_registration_number@ebstohr (a.vendor_id, a.vendor_site_id, 'GST', 'S' ) <> 'Unregistered' THEN 'Registered' ELSE 'Unregistered' END) x)
/* SELECT jprl.REGISTRATION_NUMBER FROM jai_party_regs jpr, jai_party_reg_lines jprl WHERE 1=1 AND jpr.party_reg_id = jprl.party_reg_id AND jpr.party_id = a.vendor_id AND jpr.party_site_id = a.vendor_site_id AND jpr.PARTY_TYPE_CODE = 'THIRD_PARTY_SITE' AND jpr.SUPPLIER_FLAG = 'Y' AND jpr.site_flag = 'Y' AND jprl.REGISTRATION_TYPE_CODE = 'GSTIN' AND jprl.REGISTRATION_NUMBER <> 'Unregistered' AND :P_VENDOR_CAT = 'Registered' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN NVL(jprl.EFFECTIVE_FROM,SYSDATE) AND NVL(jprl.EFFECTIVE_TO,SYSDATE+1)
UNION ALL
SELECT jprl.REGISTRATION_NUMBER FROM jai_party_regs jpr, jai_party_reg_lines jprl WHERE 1=1 AND jpr.party_reg_id(+) = jprl.party_reg_id AND jpr.party_id(+) = a.vendor_id AND jpr.party_site_id(+) = a.vendor_site_id --AND jpr.PARTY_TYPE_CODE = 'THIRD_PARTY_SITE' AND jpr.SUPPLIER_FLAG(+) = 'Y' AND jpr.site_flag(+) = 'Y' AND jprl.REGISTRATION_TYPE_CODE(+) = 'GSTIN' AND jprl.REGISTRATION_NUMBER(+) = 'Unregistered' AND :P_VENDOR_CAT = 'Unregistered' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN NVL(jprl.EFFECTIVE_FROM,SYSDATE) AND NVL(jprl.EFFECTIVE_TO,SYSDATE+1) )X)*/
